blended.narrative: Waterville Valley is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 6,520 ft. Looking ahead, 12 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 45°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Friday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Saturday: 4" of snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.
Sunday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
